title: How They Find Viruses
author: Speth, Michael
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This video presentation describes the purification process used by scientist that study nano sized particles such as Exosomes, Bacterial Phages, and Giant Viruses.  The presentation then describes the process used by virologist.  It provides a stark contrast to the purification of nano sized particles with the lack of purification for viruses such as SARS-COV-2 all in under 1 minute.
steps_raw: This video presentation describes the purification process used by scientist that study nano sized particles such as Exosomes, Bacterial Phages, and Giant Viruses.  The presentation then describes the process used by virologist.  It provides a stark contrast to the purification of nano sized particles with the lack of purification for viruses such as SARS-COV-2 all in under 1 minute.
